name: pyod
description: A Python library for anomaly detection across tabular, time series, graph, text, and image data. 60+ detectors, benchmark-backed ADEngine orchestration, and an agentic workflow for AI agents.
summaryZh: A Python library for anomaly detection across tabular, time series, graph, text, and image data. 60+ detectors, benchmark-backed ADEngine orchestration, and an agentic workflow for AI agents. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
